title: TelemetryEvent
description: Standard event logged by telemetry_writer for any agent/skill invocation

run_id.description: Unique identifier for the run (used as JSONL filename stem)

model.description: Model ID used, e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6 or llama3.3:70b-instruct-q5_K_M

task.description: Task type or skill name, e.g. code_review, implement_skill

estimated_cost_cents.description: Estimated cost in US cents (optional; computed by budget_analyze if absent)

quality_score.description: Optional normalized quality score [0.0–1.0] for this invocation

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the invocation in milliseconds

escalation_level.description: Escalation gate level at which this event was authorized

notes.description: Free-form human-readable notes about this event
